name: Brett McGuire

contactInfo.office: 121 N. Austin St., Suite 200, Jasper, TX 75951

bio: Brett McGuire serves as the District Attorney for Jasper County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Jasper area. He works to deliver justice and protect the safety of all Jasper County residents.
campaignPromises: Address drug trafficking in the Deep East Texas region
Support victims' rights and advocacy services
Improve efficiency and transparency in the DA's office
Collaborate with law enforcement agencies across the region
